title: Action Branch Cache Plan Bundle
description: A conceptual ABC plan bundle in bootstrap-only or hydrated mode.

task.description: The task for which this plan bundle was prepared.

world_state_summary.description: An external summary consumed by ABC; ABC does not build or validate the world state.

mode.description: Whether the bundle contains only a bootstrap action or a hydrated plan and branch cache.

main_plan.description: A short sequence for the expected path in a hydrated bundle.

cached_action_branches.description: Two to four short-lived condition-bound action branches in a hydrated bundle.

replan_if.description: Conditions indicating that the bundle is invalid, the state is unknown, or the situation is high-risk.

bootstrapAction.description: A low-risk, interruptible action used while the full bundle is being hydrated.

description.description: Human-readable context; not an executable command by itself.

command.description: Command identifier expected by an external executor adapter.

args.description: Structured arguments passed to the external executor adapter.

valid_if.description: A condition that must hold before and during the bootstrap action.

requires_validation.description: Bootstrap actions must be externally validated before execution.

asyncBranchRequest.description: A request to hydrate the main-plan continuation and branch cache asynchronously.

requested_main_plan_horizon.description: Requested number of near-term main-plan steps.

requested_branch_count.description: Requested number of high-value short-horizon branches.

branch_selection_policy.description: Human-readable branch-selection policy for the planner request.

trigger.description: A structured monitor-adapter contract. Description is for humans; detector, signals, rule, and debounce_ms are integration fields.

signals.description: Signal names required by the detector rule.

rule.description: Illustrative rule expression interpreted by an external monitor adapter.

action.description: A structured executor-adapter contract. Description is for humans; command, args, executor, and requires_validation are integration fields.

executor.description: Stable external executor, skill, tool, or controller adapter identifier.

actionBranch.description: A cached action branch with structured monitor and executor integration fields.

condition.description: A stable identifier for the condition represented by this cached action branch.

priority.description: A relative arbitration hint, not an event probability or safety level.

valid_if.description: A condition that must still hold before the cached action can be considered.

expire_after_ms.description: The maximum age of this cached action branch after the bundle is loaded.

fallback.description: A bounded fallback path used when the branch cannot be applied.
